name: map
description: Turn complex business goals into navigable strategic maps. Identify milestones, resource nodes, risk points, bottlenecks, and route logic.
author: agenticio

capabilities.strategic_mapping: Turn complex goals into navigable route logic
capabilities.milestone_design: Define milestone order and what each unlocks
capabilities.route_recommendation: Recommend the strongest path under current constraints

triggers: how do I get from here to there
